Galtzagorri Hook Spear.name: 加尔塔扎戈里钩矛 Galtzagorri Hook Spear
Galtzagorri Hook Spear.description:
galtzagorri钩矛是一种在末端带有三个钩状叉齿的长矛，让人联想到更长的三叉戟，专为解除敌人武器并利用galtzagorri灵巧的移动而打造。

灵巧钩矛是一种非普通军用近战武器，属于长矛武器组，造成1d6穿刺伤害，并具有解除武装、灵巧、小妖精（特征）以及投掷20英尺特征。

A galtzagorri hook spear is a spear with three hooked tines at the end, reminiscent of a longer trident and built to disarm foes and take advantage of a galtzagorri's dexterous movements.

A dexterous hook spear is an uncommon martial melee weapon in the spear weapon group that deals 1d6 piercing damage and has the disarm, finesse, sprite, and thrown 20 feet traits.

Silken Tail.name: 丝绸尾巴 Silken Tail
Silken Tail.description:
这条+2 强袭长鞭由数千根修长的乳白虹彩丝缕构成，在反射哪怕最微弱的环境光时也会闪烁，并似乎不断变换颜色。尽管这些丝缕看起来柔软如丝，但实际上每一根都覆盖着细小、几乎难以察觉的倒刺。

启动 1 命令；

频率 每轮一次；

效果 你挥舞丝绒般的尾端，展示出令人目眩的色彩与光芒。你以外、位于5英尺内且能看见长鞭的生物必须在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] 豁免中成功，否则将变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1轮。你在本轮中用长鞭造成过伤害的生物在此次豁免上承受-2环境减值。

制作需求 提供一只丝尾甲虫的尾巴。

This +2 striking whip's thousands of long, opalescent strands shimmer and appear to change color as they reflect even the faintest ambient light. Though the strands may look soft and silky, they are in fact each covered in tiny, nearly imperceptible barbs.

Activate 1 command;

Frequency once per round;

Effect You wave the silken tail in a fantastic display of bedazzling color and light. Creatures other than you within 5 feet who can see the whip must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round. Creatures you have damaged with the whip this round take a -2 circumstance penalty on this save.

Craft Requirements Supply the tail of a silk-tailed beetle.

Skagappa.name: 斯卡加帕 Skagappa
Skagappa.description:
启动 1 交互；必须放置在距离某个生物通常睡觉的位置5尺内（例如在其枕头或床下）

斯克拉甘用这些由蠕动虫群组成的奇异球体来拦截并解读沉睡对象的梦境。

在1周内，任何在距离斯卡加帕5尺内睡觉的生物都会做愈发不安的梦。如果该生物处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}状态，则它在睡觉时必须在一次@Check[type:flat|dc:5]中成功。若失败，该生物会保持疲乏，直到它再次获得一个完整的整夜休息。

在这一周内的任何时点，若有生物取得斯卡加帕的持有权，它就能引导其神秘力量，获知关于那个受影响生物的睡眠的10分钟份量的信息。为此，该生物必须对斯卡加帕施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.D442XMADp01qJ7Cs]{Mindlink}并在一次@Check[type:occultism|dc:15]检定中成功。若检定失败，则该法术被浪费，不过施法者可以通过再次施放mindlink来进行额外尝试。不论结果如何，每次引导斯卡加帕时传递的信息都相同。在其被放置到某个生物床边1周后，斯卡加帕会散开，其组成的虫子会蜿蜒爬走，摧毁该物品。

Activate 1 Interact; must be set within 5 feet of where a creature typically sleeps (such as under its pillow or bed)

Sklaggans use these strange balls of writhing worms to intercept and interpret the dreams of sleeping subjects.

For 1 week, any creature that sleeps within 5 feet of the skagappa has increasingly fitful dreams. If it was @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}, the creature must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:5] when it sleeps. On a failure, the creature remains fatigued until it gets another full night's rest.

At any point during this week, a creature who takes possession of the skagappa can tap into its occult powers to learn 10 minutes' worth of information about the creature whose sleep has been affected. To do so, the creature must cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.D442XMADp01qJ7Cs]{Mindlink} on the skagappa and succeed at a @Check[type:occultism|dc:15] check. On a failed check, the spell is wasted, though the caster can attempt the check additional times by casting mindlink again. Regardless, the same information is imparted each time the skagappa is tapped into. One week after it was placed near a creature's bedside, the skagappa unravels and its constituent worms slither away, destroying the item.

Runebranded Hide.name: 符文烙印兽皮 Runebranded Hide
Runebranded Hide.description:
这件+1 皮甲上垂落着纠结、粗硬的毛皮，但这反而凸显了其精湛的工艺与符文烙印所蕴含的力量。穿着符烙皮甲时，你对抗电击效果的豁免获得+1物品加值。带有@Compendium[pf2e.equipment-srd.eSjQgsl3pYkirOwk]{Resilient}、@Compendium[pf2e.equipment-srd.fCdcyCkGlmp0c34A]{Greater Resilient}或@Compendium[pf2e.equipment-srd.WKcvvaZ0LxwYreb7]{Major Resilient}符文的符烙皮甲会使你对抗电击效果的豁免所获得的物品加值分别增加+1、+2或+3（至多为+4物品加值）。

启动 1 符烙皮甲的符文剧烈辉光，随后黯淡，光从护甲转移到你的双手中。你的近战打击在1分钟内造成额外电击伤害。造成的电击伤害量等于1d6 × 护甲对抗电击效果的豁免所获得的物品加值。持续1分钟，符烙皮甲不会给予你其通常的对电击的抗力或对豁免的加值。

制作需求 提供一张@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-bestiary.D2DbzwcFr16eJrfl]{符烙野牛}的皮。

自动应用的效果：

  • 对抗电击效果的豁免的物品加值等于1 + 坚韧符文
  • 切换以将电击伤害加入打击

The matted, shaggy fur hanging from this +1 hide armor belies its expert make and the powers of its runic brands. While wearing runebranded hide, you gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against electricity effects. Runebranded hide with a @Compendium[pf2e.equipment-srd.eSjQgsl3pYkirOwk]{Resilient}, @Compendium[pf2e.equipment-srd.fCdcyCkGlmp0c34A]{Greater Resilient}, or @Compendium[pf2e.equipment-srd.WKcvvaZ0LxwYreb7]{Major Resilient} rune increases the item bonus to saving throws against electricity effects by +1, +2, or +3, respectively (to a maximum +4 item bonus).

Activate 1 The runebranded hide's runes glow intensely, then fade as the light transfers from the armor into your hands. Your melee Strikes deal additional electricity damage for 1 minute. The amount of electricity damage dealt is equal to 1d6 × the armor's item bonus to saving throws against electricity effects. For 1 minute, the runebranded hide doesn't grant you its usual resistance to electricity or bonus to saving throws.

Craft Requirements Supply the hide of a @Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-bestiary.D2DbzwcFr16eJrfl]{Runebranded Aurochs}.

Automatically applied effects:

  • Item bonus to saves vs. electricity effects equal to 1 + resiliency rune
  • Toggle to add electricity damage to strikes

Salt Stake.name: 盐桩 Salt Stake
Salt Stake.description:
这枚又长又细的飞镖由盐追猎兽的脊刺制成，并仍残留着那种生物致命的脱水毒素痕迹。被盐刺命中的生物会暴露于盐追猎兽毒液的弱化版本。无论你的攻击是否成功，只要你用它进行一次打击，盐刺就会立刻被摧毁。

次级干枯毒液（伤害，毒素）

对火焰的弱点在毒素被治愈前无法结束或降低；

豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15];

最大持续时间 6 轮；

阶段 1 [[/r {1d4}[poison]]]{1d4 poison 伤害}且对火焰的弱点 1（1 轮）；

阶段 2 [[/r {1d4}[poison]]]{1d4 poison 伤害}且对火焰的弱点 3（1 轮）；

阶段 3 [[/r {1d6}[poison]]]{1d6 poison 伤害}且对火焰的弱点 5（1 轮）

制作需求 提供一根来自盐追猎兽的锋利脊刺。

This long, thin dart is made from the spine of a salt stalker beast, and it still carries traces of that creature's deadly dehydrating poison. A creature hit by the salt stake is exposed to a weaker version of a salt stalker's venom. The salt stake is destroyed immediately after you Strike with it, regardless of whether your attack was a success.

Lesser Desiccation Venom (injury, poison)

The weakness to fire can't end or be reduced until the poison is cured;

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15];

Maximum Duration 6 rounds;

Stage 1 [[/r {1d4}[poison]]]{1d4 poison damage} and weakness to fire 1 (1 round);

Stage 2 [[/r {1d4}[poison]]]{1d4 poison damage} and weakness to fire 3 (1 round);

Stage 3 [[/r {1d6}[poison]]]{1d6 poison damage} and weakness to fire 5 (1 round)

Craft Requirements Supply a sharp spine from a salt stalker.

Ice Zuggle Orb.name: 冰·祖格尔宝珠 Ice Zuggle Orb
Ice Zuggle Orb.description:
启动 1 打击

这颗色彩斑斓的原始元素能量球体，被包裹在一层薄而轻微脉动的膜中。一枚冰霜zuggle球体造成[[/r {2d6}[cold]+{1}[splash,cold]]]{2d6点寒冷伤害与1点寒冷溅射伤害}。

法术可以暂时改变你手持的zuggle球体。如果你在投掷zuggle球体前的同一轮中施放法术，或你准备一个动作以在自己被法术指定为目标时投掷该zuggle球体，则会发生以下效果之一。

  • 不同特征 若该法术具有与zuggle球体不同的元素或能量特征，则zuggle球体失去其元素与能量特征，并获得所施放法术的相同元素与能量特征。zuggle球体造成的任何伤害会变为对应的伤害类型。例如，若你在投掷冰霜zuggle球体前立刻对一名相邻生物施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.r3NeUnsgt9mS03Sn]{Shocking Grasp}，则该zuggle球体失去寒冷（特征），获得电击（特征），并改为造成电击伤害而非寒冷伤害。被打断与失去的法术不会以这种方式影响zuggle球体。
  • 相同特征 若该法术具有与球体相同的元素或能量特征，则该球体会变为超充能。当你投掷一枚超充能zuggle球体并掷出失败时，你改为获得成功；若你掷出成功，则改为获得大成功。超充能zuggle球体的溅射半径增加5尺。

无论哪种情况，该法术都必须至少为1环法术，且对zuggle球体的效果仅持续至你回合结束。

制作需求 提供一枚zuggle球体。

Activate 1 Strike

This colorful orb of raw elemental energy is encased in a thin, lightly pulsating membrane. An ice zuggle orb deals [[/r {2d6}[cold]+{1}[splash,cold]]]{2d6 cold damage and 1 cold splash damage}.

Spells can temporarily modify a held zuggle orb. If you Cast a Spell on the same round before you throw a zuggle orb, or you Ready an action to throw the zuggle orb upon being targeted with a spell, one of the following effects occurs.

  • Different Trait If the spell has an elemental or energy trait different than the zuggle orb's, the zuggle orb loses its elemental and energy traits and gains the same elemental and energy traits of the spell cast. Any damage the zuggle orb deals changes to the corresponding damage type. For example, if you cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.r3NeUnsgt9mS03Sn]{Shocking Grasp} on an adjacent creature immediately before you throw an ice zuggle orb, the zuggle orb loses the cold trait, gains the electricity trait, and deals electricity damage instead of cold. Disrupted and lost spells do not affect zuggle orbs in this way.
  • Same Trait If the spell has the same elemental or energy trait as the orb, then the orb becomes supercharged. When you throw a supercharged zuggle orb and roll a failure, you get a success instead; if you roll a success, you get a critical success instead. A supercharged zuggle orb's splash radius increases by 5 feet.

In either case, the spell must be at least 1st level, and the effect on the zuggle orb lasts only until the end of your turn.

Craft Requirements Supply one zuggle orb.

Cloak of Eyes.name: 千眼斗篷 Cloak of Eyes
Cloak of Eyes.description:
这件令人毛骨悚然的衣物上缀满了各种形状与大小的眼球。若不是其粗糙的做工与血迹斑斑的布料，它几乎会被误认为是一件@Compendium[pf2e.equipment-srd.KFfM3Y8SbhdxpbQI]{Robe of Eyes}。

当你穿着眼之斗篷时，你会散发出一道炫目的灵光，射程为@Template[type:emanation|distance30]{30-feet}。在该灵光中开始其回合的生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]豁免。若失败，该生物会被斗篷上迷人且不眨眼的眼睛影响，陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled}状态，持续[[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}。无论该豁免结果如何，该生物都会在24小时内免疫此灵光。你可以用单动作停用或启动该灵光（此动作具有专注（特征））。

当你穿着眼之斗篷时，你对抗凝视攻击的豁免承受-2状态减值，并且不能使用@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.UWdRX1VelipCzrCg]{Avert Gaze}动作。

制造需求提供一件凿眼者斗篷。

This gruesome garment is covered in eyeballs of every shape and size. It might be mistaken for a @Compendium[pf2e.equipment-srd.KFfM3Y8SbhdxpbQI]{Robe of Eyes} if not for its crude construction and bloodstained fabric.

While wearing the cloak of eyes, you emit a dazzling aura to a range of @Template[type:emanation|distance30]{30-feet}. A creature that starts its turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18] save. On a failure, the creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} for [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} by the entrancing, unblinking eyes of the cloak. Regardless of the results of this save, the creature is immune to this aura for 24 hours. You can deactivate or activate this aura with a single action (this action has the concentrate trait).

While wearing a cloak of eyes, you take a -2 status penalty to saving throws against gaze attacks and cannot use the @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.UWdRX1VelipCzrCg]{Avert Gaze} action.

Craft Requirements Supply one gouger cloak.
